cases.title: Reliability Guardband
cases.lever_effect: Shorter scrub window and conservative recovery margin.
cases.inference: Reliability Guardband predicts FIT=3.08e-19, carbon=6.724 kg/GiB, latency=1.030 ns. Use this mode when 'Tighten reliability policy' aligns with program priorities.

cases.title: Carbon Saver
cases.lever_effect: Lower activity budget with reduced scrub duty cycle.
cases.inference: Carbon Saver predicts FIT=6.57e-19, carbon=4.997 kg/GiB, latency=0.980 ns. Use this mode when 'Relax carbon-sensitive operating mode' aligns with program priorities.

cases.title: Latency First
cases.lever_effect: Aggressive decode pipeline; moderate reliability trade-off.
cases.inference: Latency First predicts FIT=5.87e-19, carbon=6.354 kg/GiB, latency=0.820 ns. Use this mode when 'Prioritize fast decode path' aligns with program priorities.
